memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-14 — Trump-Xi Summit H200 Catalyst

- H200 GPU exports cleared for China (Alibaba, Tencent, ByteDance, JD.com). Xi says China will 'open wider.'
- NVDA +3.41% ($233.60), AVGO +4.6% ($435.88), TSM +3.9% from entry ($416). AMD ~$449.
- AMD score upgraded 7.33→7.67. 8th consecutive blocked API session — OPERATOR MUST place AMD manually.
- PLTR touched $134.48 intraday but failed to hold at $133.36. Skip maintained.
- XLE stop $56.15 — 2.6% cushion. Iran-US truce reducing oil premium (oil $110 from $126 peak).
- Portfolio est. $100,830 (+0.83% total). Gap vs SPX: -3.32pp.

### 2026-05-13 — PPI shock + PLTR support break

- April PPI +1.4% vs +0.5% expected — largest monthly jump since 2022. S&P rose +0.69% anyway (tech-led).
- PLTR -4.31% ($136→$129.99). $134 support broken. Re-scored 6.50 (Technical 3). SKIP.
- AMD pullback from $477 to $448. Re-score 7.33. MUST ENTER. 7th consecutive API blockage.

### 2026-05-01 — Operator-mandated deployment bias correction

- Score ≥ 7 = enter at next routine. Only 3 valid skip exemptions.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **Trump-Xi Summit Day 1 (TODAY — MAJOR):** H200 GPU exports cleared for China (~10 firms: Alibaba, Tencent, ByteDance, JD.com). Xi tells CEOs China will 'open wider.' Trade truce (US tariffs 145%→30%) reinforced. Taiwan contentious but managed.
- **Market reaction:** S&P +0.75% to ~7,499. Nasdaq +0.88%. Dow +0.73%. Broad risk-on — best day in a week.
- **Retail Sales (April):** Solid — cited as additional market tailwind (per TheStreet May 14 coverage). Consumer holding up despite elevated inflation.
- **Gold:** Spot $4,705/oz (flat). Risk-on + Iran truce reduce extreme safe-haven buying. Inflation floor bid intact.
- **Oil/Energy:** Brent ~$110 (down from $126 peak). Iran-US truce confirmed = geopolitical premium fading. XLE under pressure.
- **NVDA Q2 earnings May 21 (7 days):** Pre-earnings review mandatory May 19. No new NVDA entries after May 19. Trail stop recommendation: $205.57.
- **Bitcoin:** $80,960-83,000. Summit positive crypto catalyst. Re-entry threshold $82K+ sustained.
